name: CS2 Tournaments 2026
notes: Norwegian focus: rain (Håvard Nygaard) on 100 Thieves. Roster: dev1ce, rain, Ag1l, sirah, poiii (coach: gla1ve). DraculaN S5 and PCC S2 completed. 100T did NOT qualify for IEM Rio (April 2026). Building VRS points for IEM Cologne Major. ESL Challenger and IEM Dallas entries are estimated — needsVerification. Discovery loop should verify dates and 100T registration.

tournaments.name: IEM Rio 2026
tournaments.norwegianFocus: 100 Thieves did NOT qualify for this event
tournaments.researchNote: S-Tier event April 13–19, 2026 in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. 100 Thieves did not qualify. Confirmed participants include Vitality, NAVI, Team Spirit, MOUZ, FURIA, RED Canids, Gentle Mates, HOTU, G2, Team Liquid, 3DMAX and others. No Norwegian focus for this window.

tournaments.name: FISSURE Playground 3
tournaments.researchNote: CANCELLED. Organizer FISSURE announced cancellation due to scheduling conflict with IEM Rio 2026. Originally planned for April 20–26 in Shenzhen, China.

tournaments.name: BLAST Rivals 2026 Season 1
tournaments.venue: Dickies Arena, Fort Worth, TX, USA
tournaments.norwegianFocus: 100 Thieves NOT invited. Invited teams: Vitality, FURIA, NAVI, Astralis, G2, FaZe, GamerLegion, FUT.
tournaments.researchNote: Eight top-invited teams only. 100 Thieves not in participant list. Starts April 27 — partially in window but no Norwegian interest.

tournaments.name: ESL Challenger Cologne 2026
tournaments.norwegianFocus: rain (Håvard Nygaard) — 100 Thieves likely competing for VRS points ahead of IEM Cologne Major.
tournaments.researchNote: ESL Challenger events are a regular part of the CS2 circuit, offering VRS points for Major qualification. 100 Thieves has been competing in tier 2 events for VRS accumulation. Dates and venue are estimated based on ESL's typical pre-Major Challenger schedule — needs web verification for exact dates, participant list, and 100 Thieves registration. Discovery loop should re-research.

tournaments.name: IEM Dallas 2026
tournaments.norwegianFocus: rain (Håvard Nygaard) — IEM Dallas is a major VRS event ahead of the Cologne Major. 100 Thieves qualification status TBD.
tournaments.researchNote: IEM Dallas is a well-established annual S-Tier event in the ESL circuit. Typically held in May as a key VRS-points event before the mid-year Major. Dates and venue are estimated — needs web verification for exact schedule, qualified teams, and 100 Thieves invite/qualification status. Discovery loop should re-research.

tournaments.name: IEM Cologne Major 2026
tournaments.norwegianFocus: rain (Håvard Nygaard) — 100 Thieves targeting qualification via VRS points. All 32 participants to be determined via VRS invite list; 100 Thieves qualification status TBD.
tournaments.researchNote: First CS2 Major of 2026. 32 teams. Stage 1: June 2–5, Stage 2: June 6–9, Stage 3 (Bo3): June 11–15, Playoffs: June 18–21 at Lanxess Arena. 100 Thieves building VRS points through Tier 1/2 events. Qualification status should be re-researched in May 2026.

tournaments.name: BLAST Premier Spring Final 2026
tournaments.norwegianFocus: rain (Håvard Nygaard) — BLAST Premier Spring Final typically follows the Major. 100 Thieves qualification depends on BLAST circuit points.
tournaments.researchNote: BLAST Premier Spring Final is a recurring S-Tier event, typically held in June after the mid-year Major. Dates, venue, and qualified teams are estimated — needs web verification. 100 Thieves invite status unknown. Discovery loop should re-research.

location: Upcoming: ESL Challenger Cologne (May 12–18), IEM Dallas (May 19–25), IEM Cologne Major (June 2–21)
